title: Exempts the existing models of buses with seating capacity of 13 or more passengers excluding driver from the applicability of sub-rule (1) of rule 125C of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 up to the 30th September, 2017
description: Exempts the existing models of buses with seating capacity of 13 or more passengers excluding driver from the applicability of sub-rule (1) of rule 125C of the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 up to the 30th September, 2017

[No. RT-II028!02!2013-MVL] ABHAY DAMLE, Jt.
